name: Precision Gardening & Power Washing
description: Local gardening and power washing services. We handle lawn care, hedge trimming, garden cleanups, and high-pressure washing for driveways, patios, and exterior surfaces. Get a free quote online — fast response, professional results.

targetAudience: Homeowners and property managers looking for reliable, local outdoor maintenance services.
